info.title: RepositoryFramework.Tools.TypescriptGenerator
info.description: CLI tool to generate TypeScript types and services from C# Rystem Repository/CQRS models. Automatically creates Raw/Clean interfaces, mappers, service classes, and a Services registry for seamless integration with Rystem.RepositoryFramework.Api.Server.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Rystem TypeScript Generator - Generate TypeScript types and services from C# Repository/CQRS models

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate TypeScript types and services from C# models

options.name: --dest
options.description: Destination folder for generated TypeScript files

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the C# project (.csproj) or assembly (.dll). If not specified, searches for a .csproj in the current directory

options.name: --include-deps
options.description: Include project dependencies (referenced projects and NuGet packages). When true, all DLLs in the output directory will be scanned for types. (default: false) [default: False]

options.name: --deps-prefix
options.description: When --include-deps is true, only load dependencies whose name starts with this prefix. Example: 'MyCompany.' will only load 'MyCompany.Core.dll', 'MyCompany.Models.dll', etc.
